# Home 화면 디자인 프롬프트

> 원본: `.docs/planning/screen/01_home.md`
> 대상 도구: Figma AI / Google Stitch
> 마지막 업데이트: 2026-03-29

---

```
Mobile study planner app. Dark theme (#121212 background, #4A90D9 accent blue).
Spotify-style UI. iPhone screen.

Home screen layout (top to bottom):

1. Top bar: "좋은 아침이에요, 현아님" greeting left, notification bell + profile avatar right

2. Today's summary card: Full-width card showing "오늘 3시간 24분 집중했어요",
   with stats: 순공 3h24m, 세션 5개, 집중률 91%. Dark card (#1E1E1E) with subtle border.

3. Quick picks section: "빠른 선택" header, 2-column grid of 4 playlist cards.
   Each card: small cover image + title + duration. Dark cards.

4. Horizontal scroll section: "지금 시작하면 딱 좋은" header,
   horizontally scrollable playlist cards with cover image, title, duration, creator badge.

5. Another horizontal section: "수험생들이 많이 쓰는" with similar cards.

6. Bottom: Mini player bar (if playing) + Bottom tab navigation (Home active, Search, Library).

Style: Minimal, dark, Spotify-like. Cards have rounded corners (12px).
Text: White (#F0F2F5) primary, Gray (#8B90A0) secondary. Font: DM Sans.
```
